name: yoroll-test-plugin
description: Open Yoroll in Codex and guide browser-based interactive game workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Open Yoroll and start a browser-based workflow
interface.longDescription: A developer preview for opening Yoroll in the built-in browser, completing sign-in securely, explaining the game-creation workflow, and assisting with visible website actions. This version intentionally contains no Yoroll MCP server.
defaultPrompt: Open Yoroll and show me what I can create
Start a Yoroll Workflow in the built-in browser
Help me create an interactive game with Yoroll
